scope: Round 5 systematic ACL supplement visual audit for obvious occlusion, incorrect scaling, caption collision, page-edge truncation, source-slot clipping, and incomplete display of dense atlas or AI-slot panels.

page_ranges_reviewed.notes: Overview, evidence roadmap, claim-boundary, and render-atlas opener pages show complete figures and captions.
GRScenes render panels, material comparison, derivation companions, metric bridge, and VLM protocol atlas remain within page bounds.
VLM table companions and GRScenes stress/failure companions are dense but complete.
Material-effect pages, including Fig. S25 and S26 bottom schematics, and initial navigation case pages are complete.
Navigation companion/media-boundary/upload-gate and theory bridge/failure map figures are compact but not clipped.
Hypothesis-boundary, review-packet manifest, source-boundary companion, and references pages show no incomplete figure display.

specific_regression_targets.target: Figure S25 page 27 bottom claim-boundary gate
specific_regression_targets.notes: The bottom concept/gate schematic is fully visible in the rendered PDF page and does not collide with the caption or footer.

specific_regression_targets.target: Figure S26 page 28 bottom visual decision gate
specific_regression_targets.notes: The bottom decision schematic is complete and on-page.
No rendered-page clipping or caption collision was visible.
Route strips and media panels remain visible within their figure frames.
Small labels remain dense, but no figure is cut off or incorrectly scaled.

embedded_image_resolution.assessment: No extreme low-resolution or obviously over-upscaled embedded image was found. The 125ppi navigation strips on pages 34-35 remain visually complete.

visual_review.residual_risk: This is a visual containment/scaling pass, not an OCR readability or semantic-claim review. Dense atlas/index labels may remain hard to read at print scale.

commands.result: PASS; build/supplement.pdf was up to date
PASS; embedded image PPI range approximately 125-339

commands.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.log
